name: Cayanne Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix water, applesauce, brown sugar, salt, and cayenne pepper until well combined.
3. Add cornmeal, bread flour, and yeast to the wet mixture. Stir until just combined; do not overmix.
4. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
5. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack before serving.
